# Paste-vlv v1.1.0

## Highlights

- Added a dedicated About experience with version, license, and GitHub links.
- Added an About tab in Preferences and an About entry in the menu-bar popup.
- Refined the About window layout for a spacious, resizable macOS presentation.

## Distribution

- macOS 13 or later.
- ZIP is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed or notarized. macOS may show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch.
